name: browsevault
description: Private local-first browser history search, backup, export, and preservation extension.

scripts.check: node scripts/check-syntax.mjs && node scripts/check-imports.mjs && node scripts/check-locales.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-paths.mjs && node scripts/check-privacy-permissions.mjs && node scripts/playbook/check-chrome-qa-safety.mjs && node scripts/check-file-sizes.mjs && node scripts/check-folder-density.mjs
